title: Kya Woh Sach Tha
author: Fever FM – HT Smartcast
description: Real life events se inspired supernatural stories ka collection — jo sunoge, roye nahi to rone par majboor zaroor ho jaoge. Raat ko sunna hoga to neend uda denge ye kahaniyan!

episodes.title: #1 Highway Ka Bhoot
episodes.description: Mumbai ke Anuj ke saath uss raat kya hua — highway par ek aisi mulaqaat jisne unki zindagi badal di.

episodes.title: #2 Bachchi Ki Pret Aatma
episodes.description: Lucknow ke Saurabh Sinha ke saath ghati yeh ghatna — ek bacchi ki aatma jo apna dard sunana chahti thi.

episodes.title: #8 Planchette Ka Bhoot
episodes.description: Bani Chaterjee aur unke doston ki aap beeti — ek planchette game ne jo raaz khola wo sab soch bhi nahi sakte the.

episodes.title: #9 Purani Haveli Ke Pishaach
episodes.description: Kyun hamein purani havelion mein jaane se mana kiya jaata hai? Aaiye jaante hain ye raaz.

episodes.title: #21 Mrityusangeet
episodes.description: Kya aapne kabhi mrityu ko apne qarib mehsoos kiya? Ek aisi kahani jo har baar sunne par rula deti hai.

episodes.title: #40 Haunted Night
episodes.description: Ek raat jisne Shekhar ki zindagi badal di — illusion tha ya sach? Woh aaj bhi nahi jaanta.

title: Insta Love
author: RosePod
description: Rishi aur Nikita ki love story — breakup ke baad dono ek hi influencer company mein aa jaate hain. Kya intequam hoga ya phir pyaar? Agra se Mumbai tak ka romantic safar.

episodes.title: Ep 1 – Love at First Sight
episodes.description: Rishi aur Nikita ki pehli mulaqaat — Nikita ne challenge kiya, Rishi ne accept. Kya date hogi?

episodes.title: Ep 2 – Pyaar ka Pehla Izhaar
episodes.description: Rishi jaanta tha Nikita Agra tour par ja rahi hai — ye uska aakhri mauka tha number maangne ka.

episodes.title: Ep 4 – I Love You
episodes.description: Pehli date, ek pendant, aur pyaar ka pehla izhaar — Rishi ne Nikita ke gaal par kiss kiya.

episodes.title: S2Ep1 – Nayi Shuruaat
episodes.description: Breakup ke baad Rishi Mumbai mein naya career shuru karta hai — lekin Nikita wahi company mein hai.

episodes.title: S2Ep4 – Lights, Camera, Raaz
episodes.description: Shoot ke dauran ek misunderstanding — aur Kumar-Nikita ki dil se baat. Kya Rishi sach jaanega?

episodes.title: S2Ep10 – Confessions
episodes.description: Rishi ne office ke saamne culprit ko expose kiya — saboot ke saath. Poori saazish ka anjaam.
